title: Arctic's $1,400 AMD Strix Point fanless mini-PC hides under your desk Senza AI 370 features Ryzen AI 9 HX 370 CPU, 32GB RAM, and 1TB SSD
summary: The Arctic Senza AI 370 is a fanless mini-PC featuring a powerful AMD Ryzen AI 9 HX 370 CPU, 32GB of RAM, and a 1TB SSD, ideal for those seeking a compact and silent computing solution.
insight: Silent, compact computing now available with high-performance capabilities.

title: Corsair's new 3200D mid-tower case redefines airflow and component compatibility the case perfectly pairs with rear-connector motherboards
summary: Corsair's new 3200D mid-tower case features improved airflow and broader compatibility.
insight: Enhanced airflow and compatibility for improved PC performance.

title: Walmart flooded with RTX 40-series GPUs as 50-series remains out of reach for most gamers retailer slashes up to $480 off last-gen GPUs to offer sensible prices
summary: Walmart is stocking up on Nvidia's GeForce RTX 40-series GPUs due to an AI-driven memory shortage, making last-gen GPUs more affordable by slashing prices up to $480.
insight: Last-gen GPUs become affordable options due to RTX 40-series shortage.

title: Astro A50 X Review: For your battlestation
summary: The Astro A50 X is a wireless headset offering seamless connectivity to multiple devices with the help of its base station, providing a convenient and immersive gaming experience.
insight: Wireless gaming headsets offer flexibility in gaming setups.

title: Optiscaler team fixes INT8 FSR 4 ghosting on RX 6000 series GPUs adds support for the latest Adrenalin drivers
summary: Optiscaler has released an update to alleviate ghosting on INT8 FSR 4 for RX 6000 GPUs, ensuring smoother visuals.
insight: Improved gaming experience for RX 6000 series graphics card users.

title: Tesla hiring semiconductor fabs construction manager Elon Musk's ambitious Terafab project begins
summary: Tesla assembles core team for Terafab project to build semiconductor fabs. The team will define the fab's layout and oversee its construction. This marks a significant step in Elon Musk's ambitious Terafab project.
insight: Tesla's Terafab project may disrupt global semiconductor manufacturing.

title: US trade deficit hits a record $1.2 trillion as AI hardware imports surge under the Trump administration massive demand for chips from Asia outpaces domestic production, fueling a 60% increase in imports in 12 months
summary: The US trade deficit hit a record $1.2 trillion in 2025, driven by a 60% increase in AI-related imports, mostly from Asia, outpacing domestic production in the computing and electronics sector. This surge in imports follows efforts from the Trump administration to reduce the trade gap. The significant increase in AI hardware imports has fueled the record trade deficit.
insight: Rapid AI demand exposes US weakness in chip production capacity

title: How Nvidia's $20 billion Groq 3 LPU deal reshapes the Nvidia Vera Rubin Platform Samsung 4nm process serves as bedrock for SRAM-based AI accelerator chip
summary: Nvidia unveiled the Groq 3 LPU, a $20 billion collaboration with Groq, at GTC 2026. The chip utilizes Samsung's 4nm process for a high-performance SRAM-based AI accelerator. This marks the first chip from Nvidia's deal with Groq.
insight: AI processing gains significant speed and efficiency with SRAM-based architecture

title: MSI MPG X870E Carbon Max Wifi Review: Small tweaks, same Carbon DNA
summary: The MSI X870E Carbon Max refresh offers minor upgrades at a relatively high price point. It adds an OC Engine chip and a larger BIOS but retains the same Carbon DNA. This refresh faces stiff competition in the crowded $500 PC market.
insight: Incremental updates may not justify the premium price tag.

title: Opera GX finally arrives on Linux by popular demand offers gamers and developers a highly customizable browser with advanced resource management
summary: Opera GX, a gaming browser, is now available on Linux, offering users better control and customization options for optimal system performance and a personalized browsing experience.
insight: Enhanced gaming performance and control for Linux users.

title: Researchers reach superconductivity at ambient pressure, record high temperature milestone of -122 C reached by using pressure quenching, still 140 degrees off room temperature target
summary: Researchers at the University of Houston achieved a new high temperature superconductivity milestone of -122°C at ambient pressure, an 18K increase, but still fell short of the room temperature target.
insight: Advancements in superconductivity technology could revolutionize energy transmission and storage.

title: Save $800 on this powerhouse Alienware 4K gaming PC with an RTX 5080 and 64GB DDR5 RAM epic pre-built also includes a huge 4TB SSD and a 24-core Intel CPU for high-end performance
summary: Alienware gaming PC deal features RTX 5080, 24-core Intel CPU, and 4TB SSD. This top-end gaming PC is now available for $3,999.99, a $800 saving. The powerful configuration includes 64GB of DDR5 RAM.
insight: Unbeatable performance at a significantly reduced price point.

title: Thermalright's impressive AIO cooler lets you add a panoramic screen to your PC for just $165 bag a 20% saving on the Wonder Vision 360 and treat your CPU
summary: Thermalright's Wonder Vision 360 AIO cooler integrates a panoramic AMOLED display for a unique PC experience. It offers a 20% discount, making it more affordable at $165. This cooler effectively cools your CPU while adding a visual touch.
insight: Blends functionality and aesthetics for an enhanced PC experience.

title: Kioxia announces new Super High IOPS SSD that helps accelerate AI workloads on Nvidia GPUs 25.6TB drive provides more GPU-accessible memory for faster data access
summary: Kioxia introduces a new AI SSD with XL-Flash technology, delivering over 10 million IOPS. This high-performance drive is designed as a secondary cache for Nvidia AI GPUs. It provides more GPU-accessible memory for faster data access.
insight: Accelerates AI workloads with faster, more efficient data access.

title: 8BitDo launches $40 Nintendo 64-inspired wireless controller with 2.4 GHz connection dedicated wireless receiver even works with the original N64
summary: 8BitDo has released a $40 wireless N64-inspired controller with 2.4 GHz connection. The Retro Receiver included in the box allows it to work with the original N64 console. It also supports Bluetooth Low Energy connectivity for other controllers.
insight: Nintendo 64 enthusiasts now have affordable wireless compatibility options available.

title: North Korean fake IT army of 100,000 nets Kim Jong-Un a cool $500 million a year NK-aligned workers infiltrated in IT companies worldwide, feeding the nation's revenue generation
summary: North Korea uses a fake IT army to infiltrate Western companies, generating revenue for the nation.
insight: Global cybersecurity threats can be state-sponsored, not just individual attacks.

title: Intel's new feature can improve game loading times by up to 3x Precompiled Shader Delivery comes to Arc Xe2 and Xe3 GPUs following DirectX SDK release
summary: Intel has adopted Advanced Shader Delivery to improve game loading times, available on Arc GPUs with 11 supported games at launch.
insight: Faster shader compilation reduces game loading times and enhances user experience significantly.

title: 16TB M.2 SSD hits retail if you re ready to drop $16,000 for the ultimate storage upgrade price tag explodes 4X in just four months
summary: The Exascend PE4 16TB M.2 SSD is now available on Amazon for $15,935, a drastic price increase from its initial cost.
insight: Massive storage capacity comes at a prohibitively expensive price point suddenly.

title: Australian researchers develop quantum battery proof-of-concept which uses lasers to charge near-instantly breakthrough could pave the way for ultra-fast wireless charging for EVs and drones in the future, say researchers
summary: Australian researchers have developed a quantum battery proof-of-concept using lasers for near-instant charging. This breakthrough could enable ultra-fast wireless charging for EVs and drones. The prototype's efficiency and speed are significant advancements in energy storage technology.
insight: Ultra-fast wireless charging for EVs and drones is now within reach.

title: Enabling MediaTek M7902 WiFi and Bluetooth drivers on Ubuntu 24.04 the easy way
summary: Mediatek MT7902 WiFi and Bluetooth drivers are now available for Ubuntu 24.04 through a backport to Linux 6.6, enabling PCIe-based devices like the ASUS Vivobook 16 to use wireless connectivity. This method allows users to bypass waiting for official distribution updates.
insight: Linux users can now access MT7902 WiFi and Bluetooth drivers

title: u-blox JODY-W6 NXP IW623/AW693 tri-band Wi-Fi 6E and Bluetooth 5.4 LE audio modules
summary: u-blox JODY-W6 modules offer tri-band Wi-Fi 6E and Bluetooth 5.4 in a single package, targeting high-throughput and secure connectivity use cases in industries such as industrial automation, healthcare, and automotive.
insight: Enhanced wireless connectivity for demanding industrial and automotive applications

title: 8-inch ESP32-P4 touch display offers WiFi 6, BLE, 802.15.4 connectivity, optional 4G LTE and LoRaWAN
summary: The reTerminal D1001 is an 8-inch ESP32-P4 touch display offering advanced connectivity and features
insight: Enhanced connectivity options for IoT applications with 4G LTE and LoRaWAN support

title: Clintech Pico The first Raspberry Pi RP2354B board offers 48 GPIOs in Raspberry Pi Pico form factor
summary: The Clintech Pico board features 48 GPIOs in Raspberry Pi Pico form factor, expanding on the RP2354B chip's capabilities. It includes 40 castellated and through holes, as well as 27 extra on-board through holes for GPIO breakout. The board also boasts a dual-core Arm Cortex-M33 CPU and dual-core RISC-V Hazard3 CPU.
insight: Enhanced GPIO options for RP2354B-based development and prototyping.

title: Avaota F2 Allwinner V861 RISC-V SBC targets AI cameras with PTZ and audio support
summary: The Avaota F2 SBC is an open-source camera board with a dual-core RISC-V SoC, supporting 4K cameras, AI acceleration, and PTZ and audio capabilities.
insight: RISC-V SBC offers AI camera capabilities with improved audio and PTZ support.

title: Scientists can now build a cyborg cockroach that can pull miniature rigs through pipelines to find leaks
summary: Scientists have developed a cyborg cockroach to detect pipeline leaks remotely.
insight: Enhanced pipeline leak detection increases energy efficiency and safety.

title: PlayStation 6 and Next Xbox still expected in 2027 despite memory crisis
summary: PlayStation 6 and Next Xbox reportedly on track for 2027 launch, despite RAM shortage.
insight: Console manufacturers might prioritize development over current memory constraints.

title: SK Hynix boss says the memory chip shortage is going to last until 2030
summary: The memory chip shortage is expected to last until 2030 due to ongoing supply chain issues. SK Hynix, the world's third-largest semiconductor manufacturer, is owned by SK Group. The shortage is attributed to issues in the memory and silicon supply chain.
insight: Global tech industry faces years of disrupted semiconductor supply.

title: Fans are rebuilding Baldur's Gate 1 inside Baldur's Gate 3
summary: Fans are recreating Baldur's Gate 1 within Baldur's Gate 3 through mods, filling a gap left by the game's lack of DLC or expansions.
insight: Modding community takes over post-game development responsibilities.

title: The 2027 BMW i3 is here, and it's nothing like the hatchback you remember
summary: The 2027 BMW i3 boasts a stunning design, marking a significant departure from its predecessor. Electrifying the 3 Series was a bold move for BMW, and the result is a visually impressive EV. This car showcases BMW's commitment to innovation and style.
insight: Electrification allows BMW to reimagine its iconic design language.

title: This indie game idea went viral then AI-built clones showed up within hours
summary: Game developer Freya Holm's side project, a Tetris prototype with rotating playfield, gained viral attention. However, AI-built clones of the game popped up shortly after. The sudden appearance of clones raised questions about copyright and AI-generated content.
insight: AI-generated clones blur lines between originality and intellectual property.

title: Val Kilmer will appear in a new movie as an AI recreation approved by his family
summary: Val Kilmer will star in a new movie using AI recreation, which has been approved by his family. This comes after he was initially cast in 'As Deep as the Grave' in 2020 but couldn't participate due to throat cancer.
insight: Groundbreaking AI recreation technology brings back beloved actors in new roles

title: North Korea deployed 100,000 fake IT workers to infiltrate Western companies, making $500M a year for Kim Jong Un
summary: North Korea has deployed 100,000 fake IT workers to infiltrate Western companies, making approximately $500 million annually for Kim Jong Un.
insight: North Korea's massive hack operation undermines global corporate security and trust.

title: New iPhone spyware Darksword spread through hacked websites, putting millions at risk
summary: New iPhone spyware Darksword spreads through hacked websites, putting millions at risk. The spyware, discovered by Lookout, iVerify, and Google, marks the second iOS-targeting exploit this month. It was previously used in state-backed espionage.
insight: High-end spyware now readily available for non-state actors to exploit.

title: AMD could answer the Intel Core Ultra 200K Plus with faster Ryzen refresh
summary: AMD plans to release refreshed Ryzen processors in response to Intel's Core Ultra series, with the Ryzen 7 9750X and Ryzen 5 9650X aiming to compete with Intel's offerings.
insight: AMD responds to Intel's Core Ultra series with Ryzen refreshes

title: Scientists build first working quantum battery prototype, uses lasers to charge in femtoseconds
summary: Scientists have developed a working quantum battery prototype using lasers, marking a significant breakthrough in harnessing quantum mechanics for energy storage.
insight: Game-changing technology for ultra-efficient, high-capacity energy storage and release.

title: Crimson Desert reviews fail to meet the hype as Pearl Abyss shares tumble 29%
summary: Crimson Desert reviews fail to meet expectations, leading to a decline in Pearl Abyss' stock. The game's features, including its open world and BlackSpace engine, were highly anticipated but did not translate to commercial success. The game's performance has significant implications for Pearl Abyss.
insight: Disappointing game reviews hurt game developer's stock value significantly

title: FBI admits buying Americans' location data and says it won't stop
summary: The FBI admitted to purchasing Americans' location data, citing national security purposes. This practice is defended as lawful under the Electronic Communications Privacy Act. The agency stated it would continue to use this data.
insight: Government agencies buy and use Americans' private location data freely
